scripts.dev:legacy: concurrently "npm run dev:amadeus" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ui-next" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/amadeus run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/server run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/desktop-ui-next run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/desktop run typecheck
scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" && npm --workspace apps/server test && npm --workspace apps/desktop test && npm run test:contracts
